UserBean - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.bean
UserBean represents a user of the application.
UserBean() - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.UserBean
 
UserCtl - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.controller
UserCtl is a controller servlet that handles user-related operations such as registration, update, form validation and preloading role list for the view.
UserCtl() - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserCtl
 
userId - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.TicketBean
 
UserListCtl - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.controller
UserListCtl handles listing, searching, pagination and bulk actions for User entities.
UserListCtl() - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserListCtl
 
UserModel - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.model
UserModel handles all database operations related to User entity such as add, update, delete, find, authenticate, etc.
UserModel() - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.model.UserModel
 
UserRegistrationCtl - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.controller
UserRegistrationCtl handles new user registration (Sign Up).
UserRegistrationCtl() - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserRegistrationCtl
